text:
The board by rule may:

(1) authorize a person who purchases a license to display an alphanumeric pattern for a period of five years or more to transfer the license; and

(2) establish a transfer fee to be distributed in accordance with the contract with the private vendor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.855 — Transferability of Certain Patterns

The board by rule may:

    (1) authorize a person who purchases a license to display an alphanumeric pattern for a period of five years or more to transfer the license; and

    (2) establish a transfer fee to be distributed in accordance with the contract with the private vendor.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 219, eff. January 1, 2012.*

establish a transfer fee to be distributed in accordance with the contract with the private vendor.
